steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: The sentence has a noun phrase on the left (These extensive ______), followed by a series of noun phrases that elaborate on it, followed by a main verb and object (reflected…).

steps.title: Apply the rule for elaborating lists
steps.content:
A comma plus a participle like including introduces a list that elaborates on a noun without creating a second main verb.

Option A correctly uses “changes, including” to introduce the list.

Options B and C introduce full verbs (“would include,” “included”) that would create two competing main verbs, and Option D is ungrammatical. That matches choice A — the participle introduces the list correctly.
